examples: He took no notice of the changes, and went on as though nothing had happened.
A series of notices signpost patients to the X-ray department.
A notice was attached to the building reminding the residents about the five hour water shortage that was happening today.
The sidewalk adjacent to the damaged bridge stonework shall be closed until further notice.

definitions.text: To become aware of; to observe.
examples: Did you notice the flowers in her yard?

definitions.text: To lavish attention upon; to treat (someone) favourably.
